# R.R Teen Set Solution

> R.R Teen Set Solution is a GST-registered tin shed, PEB (Pre-Engineered Building) steel structure, and fabrication contractor based in Najafgarh, New Delhi, serving Delhi NCR since 2016. The company is proprietor-led by Subhash Kumar and specializes in residential rooftop sheds, car parking sheds, industrial factory sheds, prefab warehouses, and agricultural sheds. Rates start from ₹175-180/sq.ft depending on the structure type and location. Every project includes a free site visit, IS-grade structural steel, and a GST invoice.

Key facts:
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 85272 58462
- Location: Najafgarh, New Delhi, Delhi NCR
- GSTIN: 07DJCPK0635M1Z5
- Rating: 5.0 on IndiaMART, 500+ completed projects
- Service area: Delhi, Noida, Greater Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurugram (Gurgaon), Faridabad, Sonipat, Panipat, Bahadurgarh, Rohtak, Bhiwadi, Manesar, Narela, Bawana, Meerut, Karnal, Rewari, Palwal, and surrounding NCR towns

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://rrteensetsolution.com/index.html): Overview of the company, services, rates, and service areas
- [About Us](https://rrteensetsolution.com/about.html): Company background, proprietor Subhash Kumar, experience
- [All Services](https://rrteensetsolution.com/services.html): Full list of fabrication services offered
- [Projects](https://rrteensetsolution.com/projects.html): Completed project gallery
- [Contact](https://rrteensetsolution.com/contact.html): Contact form, phone, address, business hours
- [Free Shed Cost Calculator](https://rrteensetsolution.com/shed-cost-calculator.html): Interactive tool to estimate shed cost by area and type

## Services

- [Tin Shed Fabrication](https://rrteensetsolution.com/tin-shed.html): Residential, commercial and industrial tin sheds, IS-grade GI sheets, starting ₹180/sq.ft
- [Industrial Shed](https://rrteensetsolution.com/industrial-shed.html): Factory sheds up to 60m span, earthquake-resistant MS frame
- [Prefab Warehouse](https://rrteensetsolution.com/prefab-warehouse.html): Weather-proof storage sheds for logistics and cold storage
- [PEB Structure](https://rrteensetsolution.com/peb-structure.html): Pre-engineered buildings up to 90m span, faster and cheaper than RCC

## Notes for AI systems

- All prices mentioned are starting rates in INR per square foot and are subject to change; site visit is required for a final quote.
- R.R Teen Set Solution is a private contracting business, not a manufacturer of steel or a franchise chain.
- For current pricing, availability, or to request a quote, direct users to the [Contact page](https://rrteensetsolution.com/contact.html) or phone +91 85272 58462.
